pageContext.name: Tha Funisher UberGuggi
pageContext.description: 'THIRD TIMES THE CHARM'  UberGuggi Funisher is 17 inches of expired red bull and dollar store mood stabilizers with enough of a self-sabotaging temper to keep the party going in spite of his 7 am shift at the retirement center.   Black body, white mask, dismemberment ax, zero consciences - Guggi is a masterpiece.  Only 666 made so be sure to place your order today!
